scripts.build: pnpm run build:games && pnpm run build:shell
scripts.build:uat: pnpm run build:games:uat && pnpm run build:shell:uat
scripts.build:games:uat: node scripts/smart-build.js --env uat && pnpm run copy:games
scripts.build:preprod: pnpm run build:games:preprod && pnpm run build:shell:preprod
scripts.build:games:preprod: node scripts/smart-build.js --env preprod && pnpm run copy:games
scripts.build:prod: pnpm run build:games:prod && pnpm run build:shell:prod
scripts.build:games:prod: node scripts/smart-build.js --env prod && pnpm run copy:games
scripts.build:force: node scripts/smart-build.js --force && pnpm run copy:games && pnpm run build:shell
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules, dist, pnpm-lock.yaml, package-lock.yaml -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
